title: Figure 5 from: Li Y-a, Zheng X, Xu H, Wu S-a (2025) First mitogenome of the family Putoidae (Hemiptera, Coccomorpha) and its phylogenetic implications. ZooKeys 1247: 1-18. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.1247.144896
author: Li, Yu-ang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Secondary structures of the transfer RNA genes (tRNAs) in Puto sinensis mitogenome inferred using MITOS2 and ARWEN v. 1.2. The tRNA genes are represented by the amino acid abbreviations.
steps_raw: Figure 5 Secondary structures of the transfer RNA genes (tRNAs) in Puto sinensis mitogenome inferred using MITOS2 and ARWEN v. 1.2. The tRNA genes are represented by the amino acid abbreviations.
